title: Login Authentication Error
description: Users are facing 404 errors when logging in via Google. Need to check OAuth redirect settings and API credentials immediately.

title: Payment Gateway
description: SSLCommerz page is timing out during checkout. High PRIORITY cart abandonment reported. Technical team needs to optimize the gateway integration.

title: UI Alignment
description: The 'New Ticket' button overlaps the sidebar on mobile devices. Need to adjust z-index and media queries for small screens.

title: Database Connection Leak
description: Idle DB connections are causing server crashes every few hours. Need to review the connection pool manager and error handling.

title: Invoice PDF
description: Clients requested a feature to download monthly invoices as PDFs. Need to integrate a PDF library and design a template.

title: SLow PRIORITY Dashboard Loading
description: Admin dashboard is sLow PRIORITY due to heavy SQL queries. Need to implement Redis caching or add database indexes for better performance.

title: Email Notification Failure
description: System failed to send automated emails. SMTP logs show authentication errors. Need to verify API keys and sending limits.

title: Wrong Currency
description: Checkout page shows Dollar instead of Taka for local users. Need to fix localization logic based on user region localization logic.

title: Dark Mode Toggle
description: Switching to dark mode resets form data. Need to fix state management to preserve user input during theme changes.

title: API Rate Limit Exceeded
description: Mobile app hitting 60 requests/min limit. Need to optimize background calls and consider increasing limits for authenticated users.

title: Profile Picture Upload
description: Uploads failing for files over 500KB. Need to increase server limit and add frontend validation for file size.

title: Password Reset Link
description: Reset links expire in 5 minutes instead of 30. Need to investigate server timezone and token expiration logic.

title: Search Filter Bug
description: Filtering by 'Open' status returns zero results. Need to debug backend API query parameters and filter logic.

title: Broken Footer Link
description: Privacy Policy link leads to a 404 page. Need to update the URL path in the footer component immediately.

title: Timeout Issue
description: Active users are logged out after 10 minutes. Need to check JWT and cookie settings to fix premature session termination.
